    Deprecated API

    Contents

    • Enum Classes
    • Fields
    • Methods
    • Enum Constants
    • Deprecated Enum Classes
      Enum Class
      Description
      oshi.PlatformEnum
      Use PlatformEnum instead.
    • Deprecated Fields
      Field
      Description
      oshi.util.GlobalConfig.OSHI_OS_WINDOWS_PERFDISK_DIABLED
      Use GlobalConfig.OSHI_OS_WINDOWS_PERFDISK_DISABLED instead.
      oshi.util.GlobalConfig.OSHI_OS_WINDOWS_PERFOS_DIABLED
      Use GlobalConfig.OSHI_OS_WINDOWS_PERFOS_DISABLED instead.
      oshi.util.GlobalConfig.OSHI_OS_WINDOWS_PERFPROC_DIABLED
      Use GlobalConfig.OSHI_OS_WINDOWS_PERFPROC_DISABLED instead.
    • Deprecated Methods
      Method
      Description
      oshi.PlatformEnum.getCurrentPlatform()
      Use PlatformEnum.getCurrentPlatform()
      oshi.PlatformEnum.getName()
      Use PlatformEnum.getName()
      oshi.PlatformEnum.getName(int)
      Use PlatformEnum.getName(int)
      oshi.PlatformEnum.getValue(int)
      Use PlatformEnum.getValue(int)
      oshi.software.common.os.windows.WindowsOSProcess.getResidentSetSize()
      oshi.software.os.OSProcess.getResidentSetSize()
      Use OSProcess.getResidentMemory() for the true RSS value, or OSProcess.getPrivateResidentMemory() for the private working set / footprint value displayed by graphical system monitors. On Windows, this method delegates to OSProcess.getPrivateResidentMemory() for backwards compatibility; on all other platforms it delegates to OSProcess.getResidentMemory().
      oshi.SystemInfo.getCurrentPlatform()
      Use PlatformEnum.getCurrentPlatform() instead.

      Description
